summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PLD is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $134.86. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 50.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $141.24 and a significant trendline confluence around $140.53 (formed by 11 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
